history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A person stands on a paved road at night, facing away from the camera. They are wearing a black hoodie with a white graphic of a stylized eye within a star on the back. The hoodie also features blue accents, including a target-like design and the text "No Sleep Club" in white script below the star. The person has dark, spiky hair and is wearing a white t-shirt and black shorts. The background is a dark, tree-lined street illuminated by artificial lights, casting long shadows. The overall mood is somewhat mysterious and urban. The color palette is dominated by dark blues, blacks, whites, and grays, with pops of bright white from the lights. The style is streetwear-inspired with a graphic, edgy aesthetic.
